PACE Attrition Hashtag Guidance

## **:resources-files: Resource(s):**

* [CSM All Salesforce Renewals Pocket Guide](https://orgcs.lightning.force.com/articles/en_US/Knowledge/CSM-All-Salesforce-Renewals-Pocket-Guide)  
* [PACE Open Reds](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00Oed000006ry5pEAA/view?queryScope=userFolders) Report :arrow-b: Leverage this to ID your team's Reds and add in the \# accordingly  
* [PACE FY27 Renewals](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00Oed0000097uI1EAI/view?queryScope=userFolders) :arrow-b: Leverage this to ID your team's open Opptys and add in the \# accordingly  
* [PACE Attrition Programs](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Dashboard/01Zed000000lvNpEAI/view) Dashboard (v1) :gift:  
* NEW \- [Auto Open Red Account Report](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00Oed000009V0WPEA0/view?queryScope=userFolders)

## **:flashlight: Guiding Principles**

* Careful consideration has been placed on Hashtag creation. We are NOT leveraging Hashtags for status tracking. Hashtags WILL be used to ensure that we can track plays to mitigate attrition.  
* Leverage Org62 \- specifically Red Accounts and Renewal Records \- to track all work activity.  
* Keep it simple.

## **:red-1: Red Accounts**

Please find the guidance for each field to support reporting and signaling. CSMs \- unless there has been an agreement with the Escalation Manager, do NOT update any other fields. Please partner with the Escalation Manager so that we can maintain data health.

| RED ACCOUNT FIELD NAMES | INTENTION |
| :---- | :---- |
| **ECOMM Headline:** *Reporting will be built from this field\!* | Include Hashtags for active and completed plays. Details on end-to-end status should be captured in *Latest Update* field*.* (In other words: if the play is rejected, declined, or not a fit, remove the \# and include in latest update.) |
| **Latest Update:** | Keep history of plays \- submitted, active, rejected and other process related status unique to that play/measure. Explain what was attempted. |
| **Closure Summary:**  :reminder: *CSM and the Escalation Manager need to partner on this at time of closure. CSMs do NOT just close the Red\!* | Escalation Manager to populate this field in partnership with CSM. Confirm what worked\! A complete closure summary preserves institutional knowledge and explains *how* the red account was resolved for future reference, including what plays added value. Document what didn't work \- what we tried, and related responses. |
| **Competitor:** Primary & Other Competitor Fields | Please enter any knowledge on competitors \- this identifies the specific threat so teams can craft the right defensive play and competitive response. We can also identify trends. |
| **Product Details: Fields: APM L1, L2, L3**  *:reminder: Product reporting should live on the Red Account vs being only a mention on the Renewal CSG Notes.* | APM product details identify **exactly which cloud and product is at risk**, enabling the right team to respond. For Agentforce and Data Cloud, be sure to select *AI and Data* in APM L1. |

| LIST OF ATTRITION PLAYS [DASHBOARD](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Dashboard/01Zed000000lvNpEAI/view) |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Team** | **Measure** | **Measure Owners** | **Global Standard (Y/N)** | **Hashtags** | **Meaning** | **Report** |
| Offense | Signature Trial | [@Carey Capitan](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01GXVAK1R6) [@Chris Barbee](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8AL4Z35) | Y | \#SIGTRIAL | Signature Trial [Leader Canvas](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/docs/T01G0063H29/F0AL7SH38HH) | [SIGTRIAL](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00Oed000008xLILEA2/view?queryScope=userFolders) |
| Offense | ARI | [@Carly Schwartz](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8APEWQ3) [@Patrick Lynn](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/WAYGY919D) | Y | \#ARI | Please leverage the Latest Update field to track status of the ARI \- if we recalled it, if we nominated and it was rejected. How the ARI is progressing. | [ARI](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/sObject/00Oed000008xLBtEAM/view?queryScope=userFolders) |
| Offense | Swaps | [@Chris Barbee](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8AL4Z35) | N | \#SWAP | Please leverage hashtag as appropriate. Reference Program overviews for details: [Signature Swap Program Deck](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/18ATA_8e1tEzFaxcT5WMUBmxYAa1eHxz1mKAa8KgMdX0/edit?slide=id.g3c92a8c62e5_0_911#slide=id.g3c92a8c62e5_0_911) [Advisory Swap Program Canvas](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/docs/T01G0063H29/F08FC74JSQ1) | [SWAP](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/sObject/00Oed000008xLF7EAM/view?queryScope=userFolders) |
| Offense | Product Adoption | [@Chrissy Aja](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03CEK0QQMC) [@Kendel Ringenberg](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G5D84M0V) | N | \#IMPLEMENT \#ADOPT  | Implement \- There is an active implementation, licenses not rolled out, users trained, etc. Adopt \- Success focusing on Adoption of shelfware leveraging SG's, SA's, and other tools/plays. The precise plays can be captured on the Red Account. | [IMPLEMENT](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/sObject/00Oed000008xQl3EAE/view?queryScope=userFolders) [ADOPT](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/sObject/00Oed000008xMO5EAM/view?queryScope=userFolders) |
| Offense | Commercial Tactics | [@Brandi Rajski](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01FTC0H2ET) | N | \#RFP | For any customer open RFPs that create a competitive situation at renewal. | [RFP](https://org62.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00Oed000008xQzZEAU/view?queryScope=userFolders) |
| Offense | Tableau | [@Adrian Fivaz](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U9HPR6ZTN) | N | \#REVIVE | For any Top 100 Tableau Attrition Customers that are meeting with the Product Leadership team as part of the REVIVE program. |  |

# **:moneybag: Renewals**

Please find the guidance for each field to support reporting and signaling.

| RENEWAL OPPORTUNITY FIELD NAME: |  |
| :---- | :---- |
| **CSG Notes:** | Please follow global standards and the additions below. See \#RA Hashtag below for details on linking to Red Account. |

| Team | Measure | Measure Owners | Global Standard (Y/N) | Hashtags | Meaning |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Defense | Red Account | [@Garrett Smith](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8BLNBL3), [@Anuj Kaushik](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03K1A9D4HM) | N | `#RA` | If space permits, add a [shortened URL](https://www.sfdc.co/) in your renewal notes to the RedAcct. Use the custom button to build the link. ex. "\#RA GMRed"  ![image.png][image1] |
| All renewals with a Signature Success Plan must include one of these: |  |  |  |  |  |
| Defense | Attrition \- renewal notes, forecast / waterfall | [@Garrett Smith](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8BLNBL3), [@Anuj Kaushik](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03K1A9D4HM) | Y | `#SigRisk` | Risk of Signature Success attrition |
| Defense | Attrition \- renewal notes, forecast / waterfall | [@Garrett Smith](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8BLNBL3), [@Anuj Kaushik](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03K1A9D4HM) | Y | `#NoSigRisk` | No risk — Signature Success expected to renew in full |
| All license renewals must include one of these to identify product attrition likelihood: |  |  |  |  |  |
| Defense | Attrition \- renewal notes, forecast / waterfall | [@Garrett Smith](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8BLNBL3), [@Anuj Kaushik](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03K1A9D4HM) | Y | `#LicNoAttrit` | No known attrition — CSM believes it will renew in full |
| Defense | Attrition \- renewal notes, forecast / waterfall | [@Garrett Smith](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8BLNBL3), [@Anuj Kaushik](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03K1A9D4HM) | Y | `#LicPartialAttrit` | Potential or confirmed partial attrition — state what is attriting and why |
| Defense | Attrition \- renewal notes, forecast / waterfall | [@Garrett Smith](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G8BLNBL3), [@Anuj Kaushik](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U03K1A9D4HM) | Y | `#LicFullAttrit` | Confirmed full attrition — state why and the new solution provider |
| Please include to flag acknowledge risk (or no risk) for the Agentforce, D360, or Tableau: |  |  |  |  |  |
| Defense | Agentforce: Reduce Attrition | [@Rebekah Lester](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/USV3R4BPD) [@Jami Rutherford](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G1NZ6Z1C) | N | `#AFAttrit` | Any AF attrition risk identified \- state amount of risk and whether there is an associated red account (either multi-cloud or AF specific) |
| Defense | D360: Reduce Attrition | [@Rebekah Lester](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/USV3R4BPD) [@Jami Rutherford](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G1NZ6Z1C) | N | `#D360Attrit` | Any D360 attrition risk identified \- state amount of risk and whether there is an associated red account (either multi-cloud or D360 specific) |
| Defense | Agentforce: Reduce Attrition | [@Rebekah Lester](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/USV3R4BPD) [@Jami Rutherford](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G1NZ6Z1C) | N | `#AfNoRisk` | No risk \- AF expected to renew in full |
| Defense | D360: Reduce Attrition | [@Rebekah Lester](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/USV3R4BPD) [@Jami Rutherford](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/U01G1NZ6Z1C) | N | `#D360NoRisk` | No risk \- D360 expected to renew in full |
| Defense | Tableau: Reduce Attrition | [@Rebekah Lester](https://salesforce.enterprise.slack.com/team/USV3R4BPD) | N | `#PBI` | Tableau risk, Power BI compete |

[CSM All Salesforce Renewals Pocket Guide](https://orgcs.lightning.force.com/articles/en_US/Knowledge/CSM-All-Salesforce-Renewals-Pocket-Guide)

## **Hashtag Formatting and Examples**

**![image.png][image2]**

* **Signature Success Renewals**:  
  * For Signature Success Renewals, refer to specific steps for defining the Value Path as part of the [Signature Renewals Pocket Guide](https://salesforce.quip.com/MCe7AXF4yZDw).  
  * Format: (Date) (CSM Name) (\#SigRisk or \#NoSigRisk) (Short comment with estimated attrition amount, if any).  
  * Examples:  
    * `8/22/24 Jane Doe #NoSigRisk`  
    * `8/22/24 Jane Doe #SigRisk est. $450K attrition; implementation done, customer leadership sees low Signature value`  
* **License Renewals**:  
  * Format: (Date) (CSM Name) (\#LicNoAttrit, \#LicPartialAttrit, or \#LicFullAttrit) (Short comment with estimated attrition amount and shelfware, if any).  
  * Examples:  
    * `8/22/24 Jane Doe #LicNoAttrit, no shelfware, Success Plan created, execs engaged`  
    * `8/22/24 Jane Doe #LicPartialAttrit est. $450K attrition; implementation issues, 20% Platform shelfware`  
* **Renewals with Both Licenses and Signature**:  
  * Format: (Date) (CSM Name) (\#LicNoAttrit, \#LicPartialAttrit, or \#LicFullAttrit) (\#NoSigRisk or \#SigRisk) (Short comment with estimated attrition amount and shelfware, if any).  
  * Examples:  
    * `8/22/24 Jane Doe #LicNoAttrit #NoSigRisk, no shelfware, Success Plan created, execs engaged`  
    * `8/22/24 Jane Doe #LicPartialAttrit #SigRisk est. $450K license attrition; 20% Platform shelfware due to implementation issues, Signature value confirmed, license attrition tied to partial Signature loss`  
* **Renewals with AF or D360**

## **Summary Decision Tree**

* Is there Agentforce or Data Cloud attrition risk?  
  * Yes → tag `#AfAttrit` / `#D360Attrit` on the Opp *(always, no exceptions)*  
  * No (but AF/DC is in scope) → tag `#AfNoRisk` / `#D360NoRisk`  
* Is total AF and/or D360 attrition risk above $250K?  
  * Yes → open a Red Account following standard guidance (see below)  
  * No → hashtag is the primary signal; document estimated risk in CSG Notes  
* If opening a Red Account — is the risk single-cloud or multi-cloud?  
  * Single-cloud AF/DC → APM L1 \= AI & Data; use L2/L3 to specify product  
  * Multi-cloud AND AF/DC portion is above $250K → open a *separate* Red for AF/DC with APM L1 \= AI & Data, plus a CrossCloud Red for the remainder  
  * Multi-cloud AND AF/DC portion is below $250K → open CrossCloud Red; hashtag captures the AF/DC dimension

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image2]: <data:image/png;base64,>
